---
title: "St AndReuse Updates"
subtitle: "Sumiran Margolis, 2026"
format: 
  html:
      css: "bootstrap (1).css"
      light: "bootstrap (1).css"
      dark: [darkly, "dark-overrides.css"]
      page-layout: full
      fig-width: 12
      fig-height: 12
editor: visual
---

## Welcome to the dashboard!
This page automatically updates when there are new submissions to the [St AndReuse Feedback survey](https://forms.gle/qBV7B6iU3ifWTt4U6) to help visitors and the Transition team more easily understand the impact and potential of the St AndReuse scheme.

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
source("standruse_analysis.R")
```
